source: Pre-recorded TTS narration of long.txt, decoded to 16 kHz mono pcm_s16le and padded to a clean 335 s so the harness does not drop a sub-second remainder.
license: Script text was written for this repo. Audio synthesised by a TTS service and committed for deterministic CI input.
notes: Long-form regression fixture (~5.5 min of speech, 771 words, 13 paragraphs). Exercises sentence-end anchor trims, FAST_TRIM_THRESHOLD_S, drain over hundreds of ticks, and memory stability. Replace the WAV in place and rerun `npm run test:integration` to refresh the baseline.
